query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads) as total_leads,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE projetoCustom IS NOT NULL AND projetoCustom != '') as com_projeto,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE projetoCustom IS NULL OR projetoCustom = '') as sem_projeto;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads) as total_leads,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE projetoCustom IS NOT NULL AND projetoCustom != '') as com_projeto,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE projetoCustom IS NULL OR projetoCustom = '') as sem_projeto;
